name: Power Tonic
description: Boost Strength by 2 for this battle.

name: Rage Draught
description: Burns going down. Everything you hit afterward burns too.

name: Focus Brew
description: Bitter and cold — your mind sharpens like a blade.

name: Swiftness Tonic
description: Your feet find angles you didn't know you had.

name: Antidote
description: Clears the worst of whatever's in your blood.

name: Steel Tonic
description: Tastes like iron filings. Your grip tightens.

name: Quicksilver Draught
description: Swallowed fast — your hands are already faster.

name: Clarity Brew
description: The noise in your head quiets. One clean thought at a time.

name: Iron Word
description: You said it aloud. Now you mean it.

name: Heartroot Tonic
description: Thick and earthy. Your pulse steadies like a drumbeat.
